query.title: Query
query.emptyDescription: Import a document to start asking questions about your sources.
query.emptyNoProjectDescription: Create a project to start uploading documents and asking questions.

glossary.chunking: The text is split into small passages so the exact useful information can be found.
glossary.embedding: Each passage is turned into a vector of numbers representing its meaning.
glossary.retrieval: We search for the passages whose meaning is closest to the question.
glossary.generation: The model writes an answer from the retrieved passages.
